text:
<think>I need to first calculate the travel time for a 526 km trip at 60 km/h. I will use the trip_plan tool for this, even though it requires a fuel consumption parameter. Since fuel consumption is not relevant to the problem, I will provide a placeholder value (e.g., 10 liters per 100 km) just to satisfy the tool's requirements. The travel_hours output will be what I need.</think>
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "trip_plan", "arguments": {"distance_km": 526, "speed_kmh": 60, "consumption_per_100km": 10}, "label": "$var1"}]</tool_call_answer>
